features: уАРHealthy and EffectiveуАС: Motion Sickness Relief Wristbands provides effective relief from motion sickness, travel sickness, morning sickness and all forms of nausea.Don't let motion sickness ruin your journeys whether by land, air or sea.
уАРSafe materialуАС: Motion Sickness Relief Wristbands is made of polyester cotton and plastic, elastic, healthy, reusable.

уАРNo Drug or Side EffectуАС : Travel sickness bands provides a natural choice and is the healthiest way to relieve motion sickness, as it does not cause drowsiness, there are no drugs or any side effects.
уАРOperational PrincipleуАС: Nausea Relief Bands work by applying pressure on the Nei-Kuan acupressure point on each wrist by means of a plastic stud that work to restore balance in the body.

уАРUniversal SizeуАС:One size fits for all (Adults and Children), very elastic and harmless to skin.Size:5.5x3cm. Maxium strech is 5.5inch. Please measure your wrists before your order this anti sickness wristbands.
